name: The Dim Petition
specialty: A team of specialists renowned for their ability to navigate and exploit the ever-shifting rifts, often tackling tasks that others deem too dangerous or impossible.

members.name: Aldric Tallowthorn
members.note: A former ward of the Tower Authority with a cryptic tattoo marking his past.

members.name: Rhysarra Ironfist
members.note: Notorious for his brutal efficiency and a thick steel gauntlet that leaves a trail of sparks.

members.name: Xyra Nightshade
members.note: Known for her enigmatic demeanor and the mysterious glowing mark on her forehead.

members.name: Zephyr Silverwing
members.note: A smooth-talking cat-person with a silver bell collar and a shadowy past with the Argent Blades.

visual: A motley crew dressed in a mixture of practical gear, leather armor, and cloaks, adorned with the remnants of their past jobs. They move with a practiced, efficient grace, yet their eyes betray a constant vigilance and wariness.
reputation_note: While they may not be heroes, the Dim Petition is a name that strikes a chord of both awe and unease among the denizens of the Undercity, a group that seemingly defies the city's ever-present danger.
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a escort-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
